MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Sheila Toran.
Attorney, Arnold Evje, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Michael Pound, is present.
Attorney, Kent Qian, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-21-2010 is vacated.
